violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. Cloths used for cleaning food surfaces were left out on the prep area counter.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. Shelving in the dry storage area storing single-service items are bare wood and not a cleanable surface.
Ventilation hood systems - Design and construction. — --Ventilation hood system was not designed and/or maintained properly. Missing a filter in the hood system.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. Inside of the hood needs to be cleaned more thoroughly.

Toilet facilities. — --Toilet room used by women did not contain at least one covered waste receptacle.--Toilet room was not provided with a tight fitting or self closing door. Both bathroom doors are not self closing.--Toilet room was not provided with sufficient mechanical ventilation. Neither of the bathrooms have a vent or a window to provide proper ventilation.

Use of poisonous and toxic materials. — --Poisonous or toxic material was not used and/or applied according to manufacturer's label. Sanitizer bucket of bleach solution was reading greater than 200 ppm.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean, maintained, tissue, vented, self-closing door (1 pt deducted)
Available, adequate capacity, able to maintain proper temperature (4 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
